overall.description: First-person driving gameplay from Cyberpunk 2077, navigating a rain-soaked neon-lit city at night. The player maneuvers through intersections, underpasses, and traffic congestion while heavy rain creates reflective wet road surfaces and neon signs illuminate the dystopian urban environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered urban arterial road under overpass

agents.ego_description: driving straight following a white delivery van under an overpass in moderate rain

notable_agents.action: white delivery van driving ahead in the same lane

entered.detail: boxy white commercial van with red taillights driving ahead
large concrete highway overpass spanning the road with support pillars
yellow and black striped metal barrier along the right sidewalk
rain-soaked black asphalt with reflective puddles and white lane markings
tall street lights illuminating the road with warm yellow light

segments.scene_description: Driving under a concrete overpass on a rain-soaked multi-lane road at night, following a white delivery van. The wet asphalt reflects the street lamps and vehicle lights, while neon signs are visible in the distance ahead.

events.description: vehicle begins right turn at intersection, leaving the overpass coverage
passing blue truck on the left while navigating through the intersection

agents.ego_description: executing a right turn at an intersection while avoiding other vehicles and observing pedestrians

notable_agents.action: blue delivery truck moving slowly or parked on the left side of the intersection

entered.detail: large blue commercial truck with white cargo container
yellow and white striped zebra crossing markings on the road
brightly lit shop signs with pink and blue neon illumination

segments.scene_description: The vehicle executes a right turn at a rain-slicked intersection, leaving the overpass shelter. A blue truck is visible on the left, while pedestrians with umbrellas walk along the sidewalks past neon-lit storefronts.

scene_state.functional_zone: approach to underpass with traffic congestion

events.description: traffic ahead begins to slow down as vehicles approach the underpass congestion

agents.ego_description: driving straight while approaching slowing traffic under an underpass structure

notable_agents.action: yellow taxi driving ahead and slowing down for traffic

entered.detail: yellow and black checkered taxi cab with illuminated roof sign
dark concrete tunnel entrance with overhead highway structure
large illuminated advertising screen displaying colorful graphics

segments.scene_description: Driving toward an underpass entrance where traffic is beginning to congest. A yellow taxi is visible ahead, and digital billboards line the right side of the road. The scene is sheltered from the rain by the overhead structure.

scene_state.functional_zone: congested underpass with heavy traffic and pedestrians

events.description: camera pans left to view adjacent lane traffic while stopped or moving slowly
traffic begins to move forward again as congestion clears slightly

agents.ego_description: stopped or crawling in heavy traffic, briefly looking left at adjacent vehicles before proceeding

notable_agents.action: silver sports car with yellow accents stopped directly ahead in traffic

entered.detail: sleek silver and yellow sports car with distinctive rear spoiler and taillights
dense cluster of stopped vehicles creating a traffic jam under the underpass
concrete bridge structure overhead with support beams and lighting fixtures

segments.scene_description: Caught in heavy traffic congestion under an overpass, the vehicle stops behind a silver sports car. The camera briefly pans left to show adjacent traffic before returning forward as vehicles begin to move. Pedestrians with umbrellas walk along the right sidewalk.

scene_state.functional_zone: open downtown street with large digital billboards

events.description: accelerating after clearing the traffic congestion under the overpass

agents.ego_description: accelerating through open road sections, navigating past intersections with moderate traffic

entered.detail: massive overhead digital screen displaying colorful advertisements spanning the road
tall modern skyscrapers with glass facades and illuminated windows
ground floor commercial establishments with bright neon signage and awnings

segments.scene_description: Having cleared the traffic jam, the vehicle accelerates along an open downtown street lined with futuristic skyscrapers and massive digital billboards overhead. The wet road continues to reflect the vibrant neon lights from surrounding buildings and advertisements.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person drive through a rain-soaked urban corridor that shifts from the shelter of an overpass into a neon-lit intersection before descending back into a congested underpass. It begins by following a white delivery van along a multi-lane road, where the wet asphalt mirrors the glow of street lamps and distant neon signs. As the vehicle executes a right turn, the camera leaves the overhead shelter to reveal a rain-slicked intersection filled with pedestrians under umbrellas and a blue truck passing on the left. The scene then shifts toward a new underpass entrance, passing digital billboards and a yellow taxi as traffic begins to thicken. Finally, the environment closes in again as the vehicle enters the overhead structure, shielding the road from the falling rain.

The shot follows a continuous first-person perspective that transitions from a claustrophobic traffic jam under a concrete overpass to a high-speed drive through a wide, neon-lit urban canyon. It begins stalled behind a silver sports car in heavy congestion, with the camera briefly panning left to survey the surrounding gridlock before returning forward as pedestrians with umbrellas pass by on the sidewalk. As the traffic finally breaks, the vehicle accelerates away from the overpass and into an open downtown thoroughfare. The scene then expands to reveal towering futuristic skyscrapers and massive digital billboards overhead, while the wet road surfaces shift from stagnant puddles to blurred streaks of vibrant neon reflections.
